decision.thesis: ETH oversold-bounce squeeze long: RSI 31.46 dipte + negatif funding (-1.62e-05 = kalabalik short = squeeze yakiti long lehine) + 15m range = dusus ivmesi durdu (MACDh -1.57 cuce). 1d down counter-trend ama psikomanyak squeeze kovalar.
decision.detailed_rationale: Snapshot: ETH 1569.3, RSI 31.46, ATR 80.14, funding -1.62e-05. ~2% stop (1538) / ~5.5% target (1655.6) = ~2.75:1 R:R. 14x kaldirac. Counter-trend serbest (psikomanyak). NOT: D kolu su an 2/2 dolu (BTC+XRP long); slot ancak path-check'te BTC veya XRP stop/target degerse acilir; aksi halde kod 2-poz tavaninda bu adayi acmaz. Mevcut BTC/XRP longlar zaten ayni oversold-squeeze tezini tutuyor.
